title: Respawny
description: Simple plugin to better control how player respawn mechanic works on your server
body: Respawny - simple plugin created for my minecraft roleplay project - Votive Role Play, that modifies how player respawn mechanic works. Configuration: #radius of square where player will be respawned after death (negative values are converted to positive values) radius-of-respawn: 100 #minimum distance from the respawn point to the point of death minimum-distance-from-death: 80 #max times plugin will check if the spawn-location is suitable, don't change it from default if you haven't encountered any performance issues max-times-check-spawn-location: 100 #show message on respawn show-message-on-respawn: true
